Entities.Name: Complaints
Entities.Description: Pharmaceutical product complaints captured from inbound customer emails and routed through the handling pipeline.

Fields.Name: EmailBody
Fields.Description: Full body of the inbound complaint email.

Fields.Name: Sender
Fields.Description: Email address of the person who sent the complaint.

Fields.Name: Company
Fields.Description: Customer / company the complaint originates from.

Fields.Name: BatchNumber
Fields.Description: Pharmaceutical batch / lot number referenced in the complaint.

Fields.Name: Gate
Fields.Description: Current stage in the complaint handling pipeline.

Fields.Name: LinkedComplaints
Fields.Description: Correlated complaint ids on same order/batch.

Fields.Name: SuggestedAction
Fields.Description: Action suggested by the Investigation Agent.

Fields.Name: ApprovedAction
Fields.Description: Human-approved action at the CAPA gate.

Fields.Name: GateHistory
Fields.Description: JSON array of gate transitions [{g:gate numberId, at:ISO timestamp, by:user}] appended by the tracker app when the Gate changes.

Fields.Name: ApproveAdjustInventory
Fields.Description: CAPA approval: run the inventory disposition (Adjust Inventory) RPA step.

Fields.Name: ApproveCredit
Fields.Description: CAPA approval: issue a credit note.

Fields.Name: ApproveDebit
Fields.Description: CAPA approval: issue a debit note.

Fields.Name: DeliveryNoteData
Fields.Description: Extracted delivery-note fields (JSON) from the PDF attachment via IXP.

Fields.Name: DeliveryNoteMatch
Fields.Description: Result of comparing the delivery note against the sales order (JSON).

Fields.Name: RfiBody
Fields.Description: Body of the request-for-more-info message sent to the customer at Triage.

Fields.Name: ReturnPlanned
Fields.Description: Logged-only marker that a return was planned during Investigation.

Fields.Name: CaseStatus
Fields.Description: Lifecycle status of the complaint case (Open / Awaiting info / No complaint).

Entities.Name: SystemUser
Entities.Description: Contains Automation Cloud users and groups that have ever had roles assigned, or accessed Data Service
